description: The 'EMPLOYEE_AUDIT_LOG' table contains over 100,000 records spanning 4 years (2021-2024) and is currently unpartitioned, causing slow performance for date-range queries. Convert this table into a range-partitioned table named 'EMPLOYEE_AUDIT_LOG' organized by 'ACTION_DATE' with columns LOG_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID, ACTION_TYPE, ACTION_DATE, OLD_VALUE, NEW_VALUE, CHANGED_BY, and IP_ADDRESS. Define range partitions P_2021 (Dates < 2022-01-01), P_2022 (Dates < 2023-01-01), P_2023 (Dates < 2024-01-01), P_2024 (Dates < 2025-01-01), and P_FUTURE (MAXVALUE). Ensure all data is migrated from the original table and create LOCAL indexes on 'EMPLOYEE_ID' and 'ACTION_TYPE'. Save a summary of the partition structure and row counts to '/home/ga/Desktop/partition_summary.txt'. Connect using: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Database=XEPDB1, User=hr, Password=hr123.
